telegram.tagline: Your Entire Business Inside a Chat.
telegram.description: In CIS markets, Telegram is where your customers already are. We build smart bots that automate sales and support, and Mini Apps that deliver a full shopping or booking experience — no app store required.

automation.title: Business Automation
automation.description: Most businesses run on Excel and manual processes that don't scale. We replace that chaos with custom CRM systems, real-time dashboards, and workflow tools built exactly for how your team works.

saas.title: Product & SaaS Development
saas.description: Have a startup idea but no technical co-founder? We become your tech team. From architecture planning to MVP launch, we build scalable products that attract investors and retain users.

hero.subtext: We architect digital infrastructure that powers the next generation of ambitious companies.

mission.p1: PRISM was founded on a simple idea: the best software teams in the world shouldn't be gatekept behind Silicon Valley zip codes. We built a distributed team of elite engineers and designers who operate with the rigour of a product company — not a traditional agency.
mission.p2: Today, we partner with startups scaling their first platform and enterprises re-architecting legacy systems alike. What unites all our work is an unwillingness to compromise on quality.

alex.bio: Ex-Google engineer with 12 years building scalable systems. Believes great software is 80% thinking, 20% code.

sara.bio: Former lead designer at a Series B fintech. Obsessed with the space between pixels and the human experience.

james.bio: Infrastructure architect turned product engineer. Built systems that process 10M+ transactions daily.

mia.bio: Keeps every project on time, on spec, and on budget — all while making it look effortless.

engineering.title: Engineering First
engineering.desc: We don't ship fast — we ship right. Every decision is driven by technical excellence, not shortcuts.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency

outcomes.title: Outcomes Over Output
outcomes.desc: Lines of code don't matter. What matters is measurable business impact — velocity, retention, revenue.

Contact.subtext: Have an idea, project, or question? Drop us a message and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

cta.subtext: Fill out our project brief and get a tailored proposal within 24 hours. No generic quotes — just a precise scope and roadmap built for you.

hero.subtext: No hidden fees. No generic quotes. Every project is scoped and priced based on your exact needs.

Pricing.note: All prices are approximate. Final quote based on project requirements.

addons.subtext: Extend any package with these modules.

0.q: How long does a typical project take?
0.a: A landing page takes 3-7 days. A Telegram bot: 1-2 weeks. A full web app or CRM: 3-8 weeks depending on complexity.

1.a: We work with a 50% upfront payment to start, and 50% upon delivery. For larger projects we can split into milestones.

2.q: Do I own the code after delivery?
2.a: Yes, 100%. Upon final payment, all code and assets belong to you.

3.q: Can I request changes after delivery?
3.a: Yes. All packages include a support period for bug fixes. Feature additions are quoted separately.

4.q: Do you work with clients outside Uzbekistan?
4.a: Absolutely. We work with clients globally and accept international payments.

1.title: 1. Introduction
1.p: PRISM IT Studio ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.

2.title: 2. Information We Collect
2.p: We may collect the following types of information:
list: Personal Data: Name, email address, phone number, and company name provided through our contact form.
Usage Data: Pages visited, time spent on pages, browser type, and device information via analytics.
Communication Data: Messages and project briefs you send us.

3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
3.p: We use the information we collect to:
list: Respond to your project inquiries and proposals
Improve our website and service offerings
Send project updates and relevant communications

4.title: 4. Data Sharing
4.p: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your data with trusted service providers solely to operate our business.

5.title: 5. Cookies
5.p: Our website uses minimal cookies necessary for site functionality and anonymous analytics. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies. You may disable cookies in your browser settings.

6.title: 6. Data Security
6.p: We implement industry-standard security measures including HTTPS encryption, secure form submission, and limited data retention. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

7.title: 7. Your Rights
list: Request access to your personal data
Request correction or deletion of your data
Withdraw consent for communications at any time

8.title: 8. Contact Us
8.p: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

1.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
1.p: By accessing or using the services provided by PRISM IT Studio, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part, you may not use our services.

2.title: 2. Services
2.p: PRISM IT Studio provides software development services including web development, Telegram bots, business automation, and SaaS products. Project scope is defined in a separate Statement of Work.

3.title: 3. Payments & Refunds
list: Payment terms are specified in each agreement.
Typically, projects require a 50% upfront deposit.
Refunds are available only for work not yet started.
Final payment is due upon project delivery.

4.title: 4. Intellectual Property
4.p: Upon receipt of full payment, the client owns all custom code created specifically for their project. We retain ownership of general-purpose frameworks used in development.

5.title: 5. Client Responsibilities
list: Provide accurate and complete project requirements
Respond to communications within a reasonable timeframe
Provide necessary access to systems or assets
Review and provide feedback on deliverables

6.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
6.p: Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the total amount paid by the client for the specific project. We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages.

7.title: 7. Confidentiality
7.p: Both parties agree to keep confidential any proprietary information shared during the course of the project.

8.title: 8. Governing Law
8.p: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Uzbekistan. Disputes shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation.

9.title: 9. Contact
9.p: For questions about these Terms, please contact us:

hero.subtext: A showcase of engineering challenges solved and digital products scaled.
Protocol-driven engineering that replaces agency chaos with predictable excellence.
From websites and Telegram solutions to custom business software and SaaS products — we build exactly what your business needs.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Transformation
ecommerce.challenge: The client was struggling with an outdated WooCommerce platform that crashed during high traffic sales events and had a confusing checkout flow resulting in high cart abandonment.
ecommerce.solution: We built a custom headless e-commerce solution using Next.js for lightning-fast frontend performance and a robust Node.js backend. We integrated local payment gateways (Payme, Click) and optimized the mobile checkout flow for a frictionless experience.

results.2: Sub-second page load times across the entire catalog

telegram.title: Automated Telegram Mini App
telegram.challenge: The business relied on human operators to manually take bookings and answer FAQs on Telegram, leading to slow response times and lost revenue during off-hours.
telegram.solution: We developed a comprehensive Telegram Mini App that allows users to browse services, select time slots, and pay directly within Telegram. A companion admin dashboard was built for the staff to manage the schedule in real-time.

results.0: 847 active users in the first week

crm.title: Custom Business CRM
crm.challenge: The company was managing its sales pipeline and inventory across 15 different messy spreadsheets, causing data silos, lost leads, and operational bottlenecks.
crm.solution: We engineered a centralized CRM and inventory management dashboard. It features role-based access, real-time analytics, automated lead assignment, and a custom API to sync with their warehouse hardware.

results.0: Saved 20+ hours per week in manual data entry
